description: You are an investigative journalist at a major newspaper building a secure, organized research bookmark library in Tor Browser for ongoing investigative work. Confirm Tor is working at https://check.torproject.org/ and bookmark the page as 'Tor Exit Node Checker' within a folder named 'Secure Research Sources'. Also bookmark the DuckDuckGo onion service (https://duckduckgogg42xjoc72x3sjasowoarfbgcmvfimaftt6twagswzczad.onion/) in the 'Secure Research Sources' folder with the title 'DuckDuckGo Private Search'. Finally, search DuckDuckGo onion for 'press freedom index reporters without borders' and bookmark the first search result in a new folder named 'Press Freedom Research'.
